title: Senior Staff Software Engineer, AI Developer Experience
description:
Ready to be pushed beyond what you think you’re capable of?

At Coinbase, our mission is to increase economic freedom in
the world. It’s a massive, ambitious opportunity that
demands the best of us, every day, as we build the emerging
onchain platform — and with it, the future global financial
system.

To achieve our mission, we’re seeking a very specific
candidate. We want someone who is passionate about our
mission and who believes in the power of crypto and
blockchain technology to update the financial system. We
want someone who is eager to leave their mark on the world,
who relishes the pressure and privilege of working with high
caliber colleagues, and who actively seeks feedback to keep
leveling up. We want someone who will run towards, not away
from, solving the company’s hardest problems.

Our work culture is intense and isn’t for everyone. But if
you want to build the future alongside others who excel in
their disciplines and expect the same from you, there’s no
better place to be.

While many roles at Coinbase are remote-first, we are not
remote-only. In-person participation is required throughout
the year. Team and company-wide offsites are held multiple
times annually to foster collaboration, connection, and
alignment. Attendance is expected and fully supported.

At Coinbase, our mission is to increase economic freedom in
the world. Achieving that ambitious goal requires more than
just code - it requires world-class engineering velocity,
quality, and security. Coinbase is accelerating its
strategic commitment to AI-driven development. We believe
that the deep integration of artificial intelligence will
fundamentally rewrite the laws of software engineering
efficiency. The Developer Experience (DevX) organization
sits at the center of this transformation, tasked with
turning this conviction into reality.

We are looking for a highly visionary, and hands-on,
Principal Software Engineer to lead the technical evolution
of software development at Coinbase. While DevX leadership
focuses on organizational scale, you will be one of the key
architects and technical pioneers driving Coinbase’s
advancement in AI-driven engineering.

In this role, you will determine how to leverage this
technology to not just enhance workflows, but to reimagine
them for the next decade. You will design and build the
architecture for a powerful, intelligent ecosystem for
thousands of engineers, blending resilient infrastructure
fundamentals with cutting-edge AI agents. Your goal is to
build the tools and systems that enable our teams to move
faster and more reliably than any other engineering
organization in the industry, shifting focus from routine
implementation to high-value architecture and product
creation.

What you’ll do (ie. job duties):

- Architect an AI-First Ecosystem: Deeply embed AI agents into
  the development loop - automating test generation,
  refactoring legacy code, proactively detecting bugs, and
  optimizing performance before code ever hits production.
- Pioneer LLM Integration: Execute on our strong thesis on how
  LLMs and agents will rewrite the SDLC. You will prototype,
  build, and deploy the next generation of autonomous
  engineering tools.
- Bridge the Gap Between AI and Fundamentals: You understand
  that advanced AI tools require a stable, rigorously tested
  underlying architecture. You will partner closely with
  infrastructure counterparts to ensure AI tools scale
  securely and performantly.
- Treat Platform as a Product: Guide the technical direction
  to build and scale a best-in-class Internal Developer
  Platform that treats internal engineers as customers. The
  platform must be an enabler of speed, removing friction so
  engineers can focus on solving crypto’s hardest problems.
- Define the AI-Native Engineering Standard: As AI handles
  more implementation tasks, you will help define the
  changing workflows, technical standards, and best
  practices required for the next generation of engineering
  at Coinbase.

What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):

- Deep AI Conviction & Application: ou have a strong thesis on
  how LLMs and agents will rewrite the SDLC. You have
  experience or a clear plan for practically applying AI to
  solve engineering bottlenecks.
- Principal-Level Technical Authority: Deep technical judgment
  in engineering fundamentals - CI/CD, public cloud
  (AWS/GCP), container orchestration, and modern testing
  methodologies. You have a proven track record of driving
  cross-organizational architectural shifts that impact Xs
  (thousands?) of engineers’ productivity.
- Product Mindset: You possess deep empathy for developers.
  You treat the platform as a product, consistently
  gathering feedback and iterating to reduce friction and
  improve user satisfaction.
- AI Agents: Direct experience deploying internal AI
  assistants, "Copilot-at-scale" initiatives, or autonomous
  coding agents.
- Quality at Speed: You know how to leverage automation to
  drive high velocity without sacrificing quality. You
  design systems where security and reliability are
  standard, enabling frequent, safe deployments at massive
  scale.

Nice to haves:

- Have previous experience at a fast paced, high growth stage
  internet/software company

Job #: P71844

Pay Transparency Notice: Depending on your work location,
the target annual base salary for this position can range as
detailed below. Total compensation may also include equity
and bonus eligibility and benefits (including medical,
dental, vision and 401(k)).

Annual base salary range (excluding equity and bonus):

$253,895—$298,700 USD

Please be advised that each candidate may submit a maximum
of four applications within any 30-day period. We encourage
you to carefully evaluate how your skills and interests
align with Coinbase's roles before applying.

Commitment to Equal Opportunity

Coinbase is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer.  All
qualified applicants will receive consideration for
employment without regard to race, color, religion, creed,
gender, national origin, age, disability, veteran status,
sex, gender expression or identity, sexual orientation or
any other basis protected by applicable law. Coinbase will
also consider for employment qualified applicants with
criminal histories in a manner consistent with applicable
federal, state and local law.  For US applicants, you may
view the Employee Rights and the Know Your Rights notices by
clicking on their corresponding links. Additionally,
Coinbase participates in the E-Verify program in certain
locations, as required by law.

Coinbase is also committed to providing reasonable
accommodations to individuals with disabilities. If you need
a reasonable accommodation because of a disability for any
part of the employment process, please contact us at
accommodations[at]coinbase.com to let us know the nature of
your request and your contact information.   For quick
access to screen reading technology compatible with this
site click here to download a free compatible screen reader
(free step by step tutorial can be found here).

Global Data Privacy Notice for Job Candidates and Applicants

Depending on your location, the General Data Protection
Regulation (GDPR) and California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
may regulate the way we manage the data of job applicants.
Our full notice outlining how data will be processed as part
of the application procedure for applicable locations is
available here. By submitting your application, you are
agreeing to our use and processing of your data as required.
For US applicants only, by submitting your application you
are agreeing to arbitration of disputes as outlined here.

AI Disclosure

For select roles, Coinbase is piloting an AI tool based on
machine learning technologies to conduct initial screening
interviews to qualified applicants. The tool simulates
realistic interview scenarios and engages in dynamic
conversation. A human recruiter will review your interview
responses, provided in the form of a voice recording and/or
transcript, to assess them against the qualifications and
characteristics outlined in the job description.

For select roles, Coinbase is also piloting an AI interview
intelligence platform to transcribe and summarize interview
notes, allowing our interviewers to fully focus on you as
the candidate.

The above pilots are for testing purposes and Coinbase will
not use AI to make decisions impacting employment. To
request a reasonable accommodation due to disability, please
contact accommodations[at]coinbase.com
responsibilities: Architect an AI-first ecosystem by embedding AI agents into the development loop for test generation, code refactoring, bug detection, and performance optimization
Prototype, build, and deploy next-generation autonomous engineering tools using LLMs and agents
Partner with infrastructure teams to ensure AI tools scale securely and performantly
Guide technical direction to build and scale an Internal Developer Platform treating engineers as customers
Define AI-native engineering standards, workflows, and best practices for next-generation engineering
Bridge the gap between AI tools and fundamental infrastructure architecture
use_cases: Automated test generation for software development
Legacy code refactoring using AI agents
Proactive bug detection before production deployment
Internal AI assistants and autonomous coding agents for developer productivity
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and deploying AI agents
and LLM-powered tools for the software development
lifecycle. The engineer will prototype, build, and deploy
autonomous engineering tools including AI assistants and
coding agents that automate test generation, refactoring,
bug detection, and performance optimization.
